author: 陈与小金
description: Translate selected text or full notes using DeepSeek, OpenAI, Gemini, and other OpenAI-compatible LLM providers. Preserves YAML frontmatter and supports streaming with cancellation. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: xiaochen
manifest.description: Translate selected text or full notes using DeepSeek, OpenAI, Gemini, and other OpenAI-compatible LLM providers. Preserves YAML frontmatter and supports streaming with cancellation.
manifest.name: LLM Translate

name: LLM Translate

releases.author: chenyuxiaojin
releases.description:
首个版本。

## 功能

- 翻译选中文本（命令面板 + 右键菜单）
- 翻译全文，保留 YAML frontmatter
- 流式输出，可中断，取消后整段恢复原文
- 9 个预置服务商（DeepSeek/OpenAI/Gemini/豆包/Kimi/通义千问/智谱/SiliconFlow/OpenRouter）+ 自定义
- 命令面板快速切换服务商
- 自定义翻译提示词，支持 \`{{targetLanguage}}\` 占位符
- 超过 20000 字符正文会弹确认框

## 安装

从 Release Assets 里下载 \`main.js\`、\`manifest.json\`、\`styles.css\` 三个文件，放到 vault 的 \`.obsidian/plugins/llm-translate/\` 目录里，重启 Obsidian 启用。
releases.name: 0.1.0 — Initial release
